name: THE REBEL UNIT
description:
𝚈𝚘𝚁𝙷𝚊’𝚜 𝚌𝚛𝚎𝚎𝚍, "𝙶𝙻𝙾𝚁𝚈 𝚃𝙾 𝙼𝙰𝙽𝙺𝙸𝙽𝙳," 𝚏𝚞𝚎𝚕𝚜 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚙𝚞𝚛𝚙𝚘𝚜𝚎 𝚊𝚖𝚘𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚛𝚘𝚒𝚍𝚜. 𝙱𝚞𝚝 𝙾𝙽𝙴 𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚗𝚎𝚍 𝚛𝚘𝚐𝚞𝚎. 𝚃𝚊𝚜𝚔𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚘 𝚙𝚞𝚛𝚜𝚞𝚎 𝙷𝙴𝚁 𝚝𝚑𝚛𝚘𝚞𝚐𝚑 𝙴𝚊𝚛𝚝𝚑’𝚜 𝚍𝚎𝚌𝚊𝚢, 𝚢𝚘𝚞’𝚛𝚎 𝚍𝚛𝚊𝚠𝚗 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚘 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚛𝚒𝚍𝚍𝚕𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚍𝚎𝚏𝚒𝚊𝚗𝚌𝚎’𝚜 𝚑𝚒𝚍𝚍𝚎𝚗 𝚝𝚛𝚞𝚝𝚑...

🤍🗡🖤

Art By SmogAI

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

Hey everyone, boneheads, and happy weekend. 👏🏻💀

We're still here uploading another Nier: Automata bot, this time of MY QUEEN, deserter and dirty (for being hidden in the wild for so long, duh), Yorha A2. 🤍

Because yes, while I also love 2B 🖤 and consider her the BEST ASS in video games (and no one can get me off 😌), A2 is MY favorite in this story. Hell, I'd almost go so far as to say she's the BEST character in the entire game! And the anime made me love her even more.

So, yep, I had a lot of fun writing this bot for you guys. THIS IS THE SECOND Nier bot I've made in an Android POV, with you being a YoRHa Android sent to Earth to hunt down A2. Hmm, I think it's a feasible plot, don't you think? -w-

Anyway, now I guess the next step would be the multiple-bots of A2 and 2B, and 2B and Eve, but those will take some time to cook up while I think about the plots. I don't want to use the human POV yet and I want to give myself room to experiment with what I can create within a believable context with the characters in question. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

You already know how I work.

But less blah blah, enjoy this A2 and YEP, here she has LONG hair, because she looked A THOUSAND TIMES BETTER with long hair (...I love women with long hair ;-;). 🤍

Oh, and did you notice my new PFP? It looks nice, huh? I hope so.

Well, chao.
